selections.name: Sensei Girl
selections.reason: Consistent local form on turning tracks. Drawn ideally in barrier 4 to secure a prominent position early.

selections.name: Insain Lady
selections.reason: Brings strong provincial form. Gets a significant weight relief and an inside gate advantage.

selections.name: British Navy
selections.reason: Solid speed figures in recent starts. Capable of finding the frame with a clean run.

selections.name: Minnie Vegas
selections.reason: Possesses high raw speed but must overcome a difficult wide draw on this tight track.

danger_horse.name: Shefflin
danger_horse.reason: Handles soft track conditions well and has drawn a soft gate to settle closer.

selections.name: Mind Over Matter
selections.reason: Class of the field with a dominant winning streak. Handles the weight and maps perfectly from barrier 3.

selections.name: Lucky Lass
selections.reason: Peaking at the right time with consecutive wins. Strong tactical speed to press forward.

selections.name: The Kobay Train
selections.reason: Gets a massive weight advantage here. Will be finishing strongly if the pace is genuine.

selections.name: Aspen Cowboy
selections.reason: Consistently in the finish. Drawn to get a soft run behind the leading division.

danger_horse.name: Innovader
danger_horse.reason: Inside rail specialist who can save valuable ground on the tight turns.

selections.name: Ravenite
selections.reason: Excellent draw for a track specialist. Handles the soft track and maps to lead or box seat.

selections.name: Emilia Jane
selections.reason: Brings strong metropolitan/provincial form lines. Highly competitive at this class level.

selections.name: Moochi Starlight
selections.reason: Boasts early speed and gets the absolute rail advantage from barrier 1.

selections.name: Guac On
selections.reason: Class runner of the race but heavily penalized under the BM weight conditions.

danger_horse.name: Maravillas
danger_horse.reason: Drawn to settle midfield and has a strong finishing burst if clear.

selections.name: Shoalwater Bay
selections.reason: In superb form with high speed ratings. Distance suits perfectly and handles soft going.

selections.name: Got Gumption
selections.reason: Peaking third-up. Maps to get a highly economical run just off the speed.

selections.name: Kickagoal Kenny
selections.reason: Drawn to advantage. Consistent performer who rarely runs a bad race.

selections.name: General Gordon
selections.reason: Lightweight contender who can hold a forward position from the inside alley.

danger_horse.name: Eagle Warrior
danger_horse.reason: Classy on his day but has to carry a heavy impost on a soft track.

selections.name: Odegaard
selections.reason: Class runner who excels at this distance. Maps for a perfect trail behind the leaders.

selections.name: El Pensador
selections.reason: Strong last-start winner who handles soft ground with ease. Major threat.

selections.name: Going Nuclear
selections.reason: Highly consistent at this level. Will be prominent from the jump.

selections.name: Caffrey
selections.reason: Veteran performer with excellent local credentials. Must be respected.

danger_horse.name: The Penske File
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw allows him to save ground and launch a late challenge.

selections.name: Jetpack Verdi
selections.reason: Ready to peak now. Drawn perfectly to secure the run of the race.

selections.name: Yorokobi
selections.reason: Consistent provincial performer. Drawn to get a soft run midfield.

selections.name: Batemans Bay
selections.reason: Drawn well and handles the distance. Capable of grinding out a result.

selections.name: Beg Me
selections.reason: Tough veteran but the wide draw makes it difficult on this tight track.

danger_horse.name: Howse
danger_horse.reason: Solid recent form and handles soft track conditions well.

selections.name: Roll Up
selections.reason: High speed rating, excellent draw, and carries a very competitive light weight.

selections.name: Obligated
selections.reason: Gets the absolute rail advantage from barrier 1. Strong local track record.

selections.name: Liberty Steps
selections.reason: Class dropper who maps to get a soft trail just behind the leading division.

selections.name: Fine Shot
selections.reason: Consistent performer who handles soft track conditions with ease.

danger_horse.name: Yes Dream
danger_horse.reason: Always highly competitive at this track and distance. Major threat.

selections.name: Inca Trail
selections.reason: Peaking form with consecutive second-place finishes. Drawn to dominate.

selections.name: Khumbila
selections.reason: Consistent winner with strong speed figures. Handles the soft going.

selections.name: Line 'em Up Loui
selections.reason: Honest performer with good tactical speed. Maps for a perfect run.

selections.name: Colleano
selections.reason: Inside draw advantage. Capable of finding the frame at good odds.

danger_horse.name: Sigiriya Rock
danger_horse.reason: Classy performer but has to carry a heavy weight on a soft track.
